name: Chocolate Dream Brownies
recipeInstructions:
FOR CAKE:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8 or 9 inch pan.
Melt margarine and chocolate over low heat; set aside.
In a small mixing bowl, beat sugar and eggs for 2 minutes at low speed. Add the remaining ingredients.
Pour into the pan and bake for 25 - 30 minutes, or until the center is set.
FOR FROSTING:
Combine all items in a bowl and spread over cooled cake; refrigerate for at least one hour.
FOR GLAZE:
Melt all items in a saucepan and drizzle over the layer. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
